value: This is Amuro. Here I go!
We'll talk later. Time to sortie!
I don't know if it'll work out.
Gotta shoot down as many enemies as possible!
I know you can make it.
You have a gift for this.
You can handle anti-air combat, right?
I'll pass it on. I'm counting on you.
Return to White Base four minutes after launch.
Show me what your mobile suit can do!
I'll join you in my Zaku!
Let me see what you're made of.
Shinta, Qum! I'll come back. I promise.
Don't worry. Just wait for me!
If you want to fight, you can fight anywhere.
So, why do you have to fight here?!
My name's Fa Yuiry. Glad to meet you.
I have someone waiting for me, after all.
I look forward to working with you.
I just feel that without me...
To think they would come with open hostility...
Guess I've got no choice but to head out!
Adults just don't give a damn!
A lot of people just like to fight.
Come at me however you want!
Sortie? Ah, but these normal suits...
They even make going to the bathroom a chore.
I'm Roux Louka of the La Vie en Rose.
I'm Roux Louka. Nice to meet you.
Let us show them a display of power they will never forget!
So, you're prepared to fight, are you?
Not even I am that arrogant.
I am Haman Karn of Axis.
Do not rely on me so.
I can win with Fin Funnels.
We have to go all in to win.
I'm sensing a great deal of malice!
The enemy will be back soon.
To turn all humanity into Newtypes,
Do you want to turn this place into a battlefield?!
Even if you've been through hell,
you shouldn't put other people through the same thing!
I just have to see this through, right?!
Get it back in order before I return.
Our enemies won't be so willing to wait, after all.
Fight like you mean to take them down, or you'll taste defeat!
If you wish to call me Char,
As I am now, I see myself as nothing more than a vessel.
This is what my mask is for.
Something out there is lying in wait for us.
That you will return to my side.
The path, no matter what it is,
They're a bunch of phonies, anyway!
Can you help me with this?
Don't suppose you know this guy, right?
I'm always game for a Gundam Fight!
Why does this suit have to be so tight?
I might not be a fighter...
But I still have the will to protect someone.
Master Asia, Undefeated of the East.
Allow me to lend you a hand!
Just don't get in my way.
Let me show you just how strong I am!
Seven minutes before I start the mission.
I'll just have to trust in myself and fight.
Those who come after your life...
...and the targets you're trying to take down, are your enemies.
I've worked to rid myself of sentiment...
That's the type of man I've become.
All who stand in our way...
I'll bear the karma of conflict on my own!
It may be a simple mission...
But we have to be ready for anything.
As long as I am alive...
I will not stray from the path of peace.
I will start by doing what I can...
By taking the first step toward total peace.
I want to protect it all...
I don't want to repeat the same mistakes.
All anyone can do is fight...
We live in such a sad world.
Well, I guess that's my cue.
Let's give this everything we've got.
It's the only thing I can do now.
Perhaps the answer is to be found...
...on the other side of this battle.
To bring happiness to the people!
To build a world full of bliss!
I've always fought on my own.
So, I'm glad I've made friends now.
I have people I want to protect...
It's not that I want to fight...
I just want to protect everyone.
I have to end this fight...
Why can't we live in a peaceful world?
Power or desire alone is not enough...
You're a kind person, aren't you?
Tell them Lacus Clyne is going to sing the song of peace.
Please, give us the strength we need...
...to break the chains of endless war!
And bring this to an end!
Send all the units you want!
So long as the conflict continues...
If we don't...we'll never face the future.
All of us here are fighting for the future!
We'll have this settled in three minutes.
The mission plan might be straightforward...
But I want you to keep your guard up.
This operation couldn't be more important.
My intuition as a tactical forecaster calls.
I might still be a kid...
But I'm sure I can help!
I need to protect all of them!
I'm not sure what I can do...
But I think I'll regret not trying.
I have a bad feeling about this.
It's what an Asuno man does!
I'm Mikazuki Augus. I'm with Tekkadan.
I fight for Tekkadan and all the others.
Try not to get carried away.
I can't bring disgrace to Orga.
I'm going to fight. Alone, if I have to.
I want to see it all...
This isn't just my fight anymore.
Please make a choice you can be proud of.
Choose a future that is filled with hope!
It's time to fight our fight.
Tell them the time has come to finally rise up.
A truth and a world propped up solely by raw power!
Here's something my mom taught me...
Running away gets you one. But if you can move forward, then you gain two.
If we're going to do this...
Then we can't afford to cut corners.
Come on, let's go! Let's go!
Victory is never determined by mobile suit performance alone.
The result itself is the only truth!
Dad won't have anything to complain about.
Feels like it's been a long time.
Let me help you! Let me help you!
Nice to meet you! Nice to meet you!
You can do it! You can do it!
You got this! You got this!
I've missed you! I've missed you!
I still have a place to go home to.
Nothing feels as good as this!
But I pushed the Gundam too hard.
It's a matter of getting used to it...
Is that the same fate that awaits us?
...you must always think several steps ahead.
It's the least I could do.
Good, the operation was a success.
I wish things could always go this way.
So, the enemy decided to go all out, too.
Nobody wants a fight like this...
That's why I have to end this now.
Looks like they've gotten used to fighting, but...
I don't feel any psychological pressure.
Fight it and you'll only die in vain.
In the end, they can't do a thing.
Let's go back to the Argama.
It's like I said, I'm a pilot myself!
What do you think? I've gotten good, right?
We did it! We really did it!
I'm glad to have someone on my side I can rely on.
They had real potential. What a shame.
The difference between the average and the gifted...
All has been laid bare in battle.
I think I'll take a trip to the stars.
It's not an easy thing to do.
Sorry, but it's time to end this!
I can't lose! I gotta show 'em what kids can do!
We have to scrabble and scrape...
...if we want to earn enough to survive.
I've got to see this war through.
They can't be allowed to get away with this.
You sure are giving me a hard time!
We can't linger on the battlefield.
War drags even a child like that onto the battlefield...
We have to end this now.
Couldn't you just fall in love with me?!
The cool part at the end...
Guess I'll have to give it my all if we're gonna win!
If you refuse to comply with my will...
...then I will have to eliminate you!
That should be the last of it.
That might not work next time.
...who can give me a hard time.
Thank you for your hard work.
Earth is doomed at this rate.
...about the goodwill and possibility in mankind.
Every person has a wish of their own.
The death of anyone is not to be taken lightly,
so I will do everything possible!
Whether it's because I have to,
So be it... Including political measures,
can hardly be called a hindrance.
What is visible to the eyes
is only a fraction of the world.
It is all thanks to you.
We can only keep moving forward.
You only talk in the same patterns.
You're going to do something scary...
It's about what you can take with you when you die...
We don't know the meaning of defeat!
I can't lose! Not until I've reached my goal!
But it looks like I was stronger.
This was nothing to be proud of.
Why do they always enjoy fighting like this?
Let's carry this victory into tomorrow.
Is that all the power you can muster?!
You should have run while you had the chance!
My body could take any hardships...
If only it was younger by a few years!
So why do I feel empty inside?
Just what in the world am I doing?
I still have far to go.
This will bring us one step closer to peace.
Many more are to be expected.
Just one mistake would have spelled disaster!
...there are no more obstacles in our way.
We somehow managed to pull through.
Let us put our minds together...
...to find a solution to the war as soon as possible.
I don't care how it happened.
I'm just glad the fighting stopped.
I don't have any special abilities.
I just wanted to protect Tiffa.
I'll be counting on you next time.
Whew, thought I was dead meat...
I didn't want my future with Garrod...
...to be built in such a sad time.
The future is what we make of it.
Not until we find the answer.
It couldn't have gone any other way.
The cross I'm meant to bear?
I think I'm finally starting to understand...
...what it is I really need to fight.
There's still so much we can't protect!
They don't have any fight left in them.
It's too late to stop a fight...
We can take our time now.
What is it that we really have to fight with, I wonder?
War is a difficult thing, isn't it?
We cannot allow ourselves to be defeated...
I will sing the song of peace.
There's still time for my voice to reach the world.
Why did it turn out like this?!
It would be nice to unwind.
I thought we wouldn't make it.
So this is as far as it goes.
We've taken a bit of damage.
I'll destroy...the twistedness of this world...
...with the force of my own will!
Even if the world abandons us...
We will not abandon the world!
I'll take a close look at the combat data later on.
We hold you in high regard.
That's why we rely on you so much.
I'm glad you were with us.
You were the key to this operation.
I need to transfer it to the AGE System now!
I will not turn away from it!
I want to fight for those I love.
There is always something I can do.
I think I finally understand that.
It's only natural considering the collateral damage.
I can't take much more damage!
I... I'm just doing what I can...
Can't wait to see what Atra's cooked up.
I'm not the best at making hard choices.
It's up to Orga to decide.
If you want to inspire hope in people...
You have to become an example yourself.
They're dirty with everyone's blood and expectations...
But still, I'm proud of these hands.
I studied a lot...about many things...
So that I could bring to fruition the wishes entrusted to me...
...is to inspire hope...like the girl in that book.
I must live up to my responsibilities...
You have kept me good company all this time.
With the honor and distinction I expect from you.
I am but a few steps away...
...from the world I've always wished for!
Hmph... No time to mess around.
True revolution, just like this battle...
Whether you win or not, there are two things you gain by moving forward...
Yeah, business has been taking off!
We were able to get the word out thanks to you.
I can't have you falling over.
Are you throwing in the towel already?!
Because I'm not about to let us lose now!
I see all the pieces on the board.
...how scary it is to move forward.
You did great! You did great!
You did it! You truly did it! Good work! Good work!
It's over! It's over! Well done! Well done!
Way to go! Way to go!
